parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ id: $json.id, content: $json.content, title: $json.title, source: $json.source, source_slug: $json.source_slug, published_at: $json.published_at, url: $json.url, article_id: $json.article_id }]) }}

meta.description: Polls RSS feeds every 2 hours, processes articles, and upserts them to Pinecone with embeddings
